description:
Dash Parr has just enrolled in the school. His older sister, Violet Parr, is already attending, and their father, Robert Parr, already has a parent account. Link the existing parent record for 'Robert Parr' to the student 'Dash Parr' to ensure he is correctly linked to both children without creating a duplicate parent record.
